title: Chat Alerts
description: Create custom on-screen alerts or automated chat triggers in Minecraft for specific messages or regex patterns, all configurable via an in-game GUI.
body:
# Overview
This mod adds a customizable in-game alert system for Minecraft 1.8.9. It lets you create pattern-based triggers (including regex) that display on-screen alerts with your own message, color, sound, and text size. You can also set it up to automatically send messages or run commands when a trigger is activated.
# How to use
In-game, use the ```/alerts``` command to open up the alert list GUI, where you can delete, edit, and create new alerts/triggers.
## Known Bugs
- When editing a sound for an alert, it plays again afer you leave the GUI.
- _Report bugs to arowos on discord please_
